title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Lenovo India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Lenovo India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Lenovo India Capital India in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Lenovo India Capital India:
Lenovo India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenovo India Capital India!
